brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: One more. Pull every column for the row where the name is '???'. I want you to see what I've been worrying about. The blanks are filled with hints — you've got this.

hints.text: Carol: 'I asked for just the one row. Your filter isn't filtering.'
Carol: 'Empty. The comparison operator matters here — for text, try =.'
Carol: 'Syntax trouble. Remember quotes around text values.'
Carol: 'You want all columns, for the one row where name equals that placeholder.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: There it is. Year 87,000. Engagement 'active.' No era, no nothing. You'll see that row again. For now — go home. Tomorrow: Pharaoh Menkaure, and we learn to filter properly.
